subcodes.title: Words to Arthur Agnew et al, spoken on 1907-04-10
subcodes.first_line: These dishes are Persian dishes. Although the Persian dishes are simple, I hope the spiritual dishes may be powerful... Between material things a spiritual things there is a connection. The more healthful his body the greater
subcodes.subjects: @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @material world a reflection of the spiritual, @East and West; communication between East and West, @unity; oneness of humanity
